extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked ROGLIČ in final 200m of Grand Colombier summit finish, taking stage and 4 bonus seconds to cut GC gap to 40 seconds.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR demonstrated superior acceleration on steep gradient finishes, attacking inside final 200m when ROGLIČ stayed defensive throughout climb.
KUSS pulling to finish line for ROGLIČ reveals Jumbo-Visma prioritizing GC defense over stage wins when bonification seconds threaten.
DUMOULIN massive tempo pull to summit despite GC position suggests team orders over personal GC ambitions when leader threatened.
BERNAL losing 7:19 on Grand Colombier proves previous Pyrenees time losses weren't tactical positioning but genuine collapse.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Second stage win in week plus 4-second bonus gap shows peak form arriving, now tactical aggressor not reactor.
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Defended yellow but couldn't respond to POGAČAR sprint, revealing weakness in explosive accelerations despite strong sustained climbing.
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: 7:19 loss on Grand Colombier confirms catastrophic form collapse, not tactical waiting; title defense mathematically over.
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: Stayed with yellow jersey group through summit finish, moved from 9th to 6th GC, emerging as podium contender.
rider_signals.URÁN Rigoberto: positive: Moved to third overall without visible attacks, riding smart defensive race while favorites marked each other.
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Pulled to finish line on summit despite personal GC position, perfect domestique work when ROGLIČ needed bonification defense.
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: Massive sustained pull to summit despite 10th GC shows team commitment, critical for protecting ROGLIČ from early attacks.
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: negative: Touch-wheels crash 8 miles in while glancing backward for breakaway gap shows poor spatial awareness; abandoned Tour.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: neutral: Crash took out BERNAL's key support rider early, removing INEOS tactical flexibility before mountains even started.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Lost 3:48 on Grand Colombier, confirming decline continues; cannot follow modern explosive climbing accelerations.
